topic.title: MLK Jr Day, Holiday Observance - Monday, January 19
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

On account of MLK Jr. Day today, Monday Jan 19, all US campuses will remain closed, honoring the civil rights and labor movement leader. I'm moving my Office hours to tomorrow Tuesday Jan 20 (11AM - 1PM EST). However, I will still remain available asynchronously today on Teams. Feel free to reach out to me and I'll do my best to help you.

 

Stay warm,

Arundhati Bandopadhyaya

Teaching Assistant: INFO 7375
